name: 🐛 Bug Report
description: Report something that's broken or behaves unexpectedly
labels: ['bug', 'triage']
assignees: []
---

## What happened

<!-- A clear, concise description of the bug. -->

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

<!-- What you expected to happen. -->

## Actual behavior

<!-- What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, and screenshots. -->

## Environment

- **Role**: [ ] Admin [ ] Senior TL [ ] TL [ ] Captain [ ] Intern
- **Browser**: e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17
- **Device**: [ ] Desktop [ ] Tablet [ ] Mobile
- **Build**: commit SHA or release tag (e.g. `v2026.06.1`)

## Logs / screenshots

<!-- Paste relevant server logs or attach a screenshot. Remove any secrets. -->

## Severity

- [ ] **Critical** — system is down or data loss
- [ ] **High** — major feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] **Medium** — feature partially broken, workaround exists
- [ ] **Low** — cosmetic, polish, edge case
